title: Rolling Home
writer: John Hunter Booth, Rex Taylor, John McDermott
actors: Reginald Denny, Marian Nixon, E.J. Ratcliffe
plot: Promoter Nat Alden has had bad luck on his deal and is broke. He meets an old Army pal who is now a chauffeur of the businessman who threw the luckless Nat out of his office. Nat is on his way back to his small hometown, where he ...
